prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to an environmental permit application regulated by the Environment Agency under the Environmental Permitting Regulations applicable in England and Wales. It does not apply to Scotland, which has separate environmental regulatory frameworks.
